scenario.name: REGISTER alice
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:acme.example SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@acme.example>;tag=[pid][call_number] To: <sip:alice@acme.example> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:acme.example SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@acme.example>;tag=[pid][call_number] To: <sip:alice@acme.example> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [authentication username=alice password=alice-secret] Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
